subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! I know not what the fire is which hath been ignited in the midmost heart of creation
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی لم ادر ای نار اشتعلت فی قطب الاکوان تالله بها احترقت کل ما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
